word: G3547 - νομοδιδάσκαλος - nomodidáskalos - nom-od-id-as'-kal-os - Doctor of the law

sections.paragraph:
- Original: νομοδιδάσκαλος

- Transliteration: Nomodidaskalos

- Phonetic: nom-od-id-as'-kal-os

- Definition:

1. a teacher and interpreter of the law: among the Jews

a. of those who among Christians went about as champions and interpreters of the Mosaic law

- Origin: from G3551 and G1320

- TDNT entry: 04:39,2

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G3551 and G1320; an expounder of the (Jewish) law that is a Rabbi: - doctor (teacher) of the law.
